caption: 🚨 Is your website secretly driving customers away? Your website should be helping your business grow—not costing you opportunities. Here are 5 signs your website may be losing customers: ❌ Slow loading speed ❌ Poor mobile experience ❌ No clear call-to-action ❌ Outdated design ❌ No lead capture system In 2026, customers expect fast, mobile-friendly, and easy-to-use websites. If they can't quickly find what they need, they'll move on to a competitor. A high-performing website should: ✅ Build trust instantly ✅ Generate leads 24/7 ✅ Capture customer inquiries ✅ Support business growth ✅ Convert visitors into customers Your website isn't just an online presence—it's one of your most powerful business assets. 💡 Which of these issues do you think hurts businesses the most?
